title: celtis paniculata
intro: Celtis paniculata, also known as the nettle tree or panicled nettle tree, is a deciduous tree or shrub native to China and Taiwan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Celtis paniculata include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and treating digestive issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Celtis paniculata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulations, such as capsules and tablets.
